# Week - It's hot out here: Dive into thermal remote sensors

<br>

Thermal remote sensing provides a unique way to observe the Earth's energy balance and surface processes, making it an essential tool for monitoring environmental change and supporting more informed decision-making in a warming world. Follow the presentation to learn more about the topic this week.

```{r, echo=FALSE}
xaringanExtra::embed_xaringan(url = "https://ssoubie.github.io/thermal_sensors/#1",
                              ratio = "16:9")
```


<br>
<br>


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/dTynAIxM8CU?si=ZwnNQVJsHnR1u9LQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
